audience_summary: B2B small teams (5-25 people) who need lightweight task coordination without enterprise overhead.
stack_note: Vue 3 SPA with PrimeVue; FastAPI backend for auth, team roster, and settings.

personas.name: Jordan
personas.primary_job: See blockers and team capacity at a glance
personas.design_implication: Calm dashboard density, clear roster status

personas.name: Riley
personas.design_implication: Focused app chrome; settings in obvious card stack

personas.name: Sam
personas.primary_job: Decide if the product fits the team
personas.anxiety: Wasted onboarding on the wrong tool

route_intent.mindset: Wants control over profile and notifications

pages.purpose: Public marketing homepage: hero, features, CTA to /login
Team roster table from FastAPI: not KPI stat grid

competitive_edge: Simple team roster view without project-management sprawl
anti_audience: Enterprise IT teams requiring SSO-only procurement and deep compliance workflows
voice_tone: Plain, confident, no buzzwords. Verb-first CTAs. Helpful errors, not cute.
brand_personality: Confident, calm B2B SaaS: approachable for small teams
design_references: Linear: crisp borders and focused density
Vercel marketing: hero rhythm for Sam
anti_references: Dense ERP grid with no whitespace
